overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through a rain-soaked neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle travels along elevated highways and descends into urban streets illuminated by vibrant holographic advertisements and dynamic street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with green sound barriers

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along elevated highway during heavy rain, maintaining lane position

entered.detail: tall green acoustic barrier wall running parallel to the highway
distant glowing advertisements and building lights visible through rain
tall pole-mounted lights illuminating the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked elevated highway at night, with green sound barriers lining the right side. The vehicle moves forward through heavy rain, with distant neon city lights visible through the haze. Streetlights cast reflections on the wet asphalt as the camera maintains a steady driving pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway section with concrete barriers

events.description: passing under overpass structure into more enclosed highway section with concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: continuing along highway under overhead structures, following a beige sedan ahead

notable_agents.action: beige sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: solid concrete safety barrier replacing the green sound wall
large concrete overpass spanning across the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a more enclosed highway section marked by concrete barriers and overhead overpass structures. The lighting becomes more mixed as the camera passes under the overpass, and a beige sedan is visible driving ahead in the same lane. The rain continues but visibility is slightly sheltered by the overhead structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp with large digital billboards

events.description: exiting highway onto descending ramp with large commercial billboards becoming visible
navigating right turn at bottom of exit ramp onto city street

agents.ego_description: taking the highway exit and descending the ramp, then turning onto the street level

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement screen showing animated content on building facade
tall urban structures with illuminated windows and signage
painted white pedestrian crossing lines on the road surface

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the highway onto a descending ramp where massive digital billboards dominate the left side of the frame. The camera turns right at the bottom of the ramp, transitioning to street level with crosswalk markings visible. Commercial buildings with bright signage line the street as the vehicle enters a more urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with red neon lighting and safety barriers

events.description: entering district with prominent red neon lighting illuminating the street barriers
navigating through intersection with cross traffic and road barriers

agents.ego_description: driving through red-lit urban streets, navigating intersections and passing other vehicles

notable_agents.action: white van crossing the intersection from the left side

entered.detail: vibrant red neon strips mounted on barriers and buildings creating distinct atmospheric lighting
safety barriers painted bright red lining the right side of the road
floating holographic signs and projections above the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a distinct district characterized by intense red neon lighting that bathes the street barriers and road surface. The camera navigates through intersections marked by crosswalks and red-painted safety barriers. A white van crosses from the left at one intersection, and holographic advertisements float above the street level, contributing to the cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed urban thoroughfare with underpasses and digital signage

events.description: passing under overpass into more enclosed street section with large support pillars
approaching tunnel entrance with changing light conditions and road debris visible

agents.ego_description: continuing through mixed city streets with varying neon lighting and architectural elements

entered.detail: massive concrete support pillar for the overhead highway structure
dark tunnel opening with illuminated entrance markings ahead
directional signage mounted above the road indicating routes

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions through a mixed urban environment with large concrete support pillars and overhead highway structures. The red neon lighting gives way to more varied blue and white illumination as the vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance. Digital advertisement screens and overhead directional signs line the route, with the road surface showing scattered debris and reflections from the persistent rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive from a rain-slicked elevated highway into the dense, neon-saturated heart of a cyberpunk city. It begins on an open highway lined with green sound barriers, moving through heavy rain and haze toward distant city lights. As the vehicle passes under concrete overpasses and follows a beige sedan, the scene shifts down a descending ramp where massive digital billboards replace the open sky. The camera then turns onto street level, transitioning from bright commercial signage into a district bathed in intense red neon light and floating holographic advertisements. Finally, the red glow gives way to blue and white illumination as the vehicle navigates past concrete support pillars and overhead signs toward a tunnel entrance.
